parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $json.body.channel_id || 'C0AKJ788GJK', text: ':film_frames: *Generating video...*\n> ' + ($json.body.prompt || body.text || '') + '\n_This takes 2-5 minutes (AnimateDiff 16-frame MP4)_' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'qwen3:14b-q4_K_M', stream: false, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are an expert at writing Wan2.1 text-to-video prompts. Wan2.1 uses T5 text encoding and understands natural, detailed descriptions — NOT keyword lists.

RULES:
1. Start with the main subject and action clearly
2. Describe motion specifically (e.g., 'slowly orbiting', 'gently swaying', 'smoothly gliding')
3. Include camera perspective (e.g., 'cinematic close-up', 'wide establishing shot', 'slow dolly forward')
4. Add lighting and atmosphere (e.g., 'warm golden hour light', 'dramatic storm clouds', 'neon-lit night')
5. End with: 'cinematic quality, smooth motion, highly detailed'
6. Max 120 words — be vivid and specific
7. Output ONLY the prompt text — no explanations, no reasoning, no markdown' }, { role: 'user', content: $('Webhook').first().json.body.prompt || $('Webhook').first().json.body.text || '' } ] }) }}
